summary: Add role-safe Program Teacher dashboard Needs Attention drill-downs so rows with exact existing destinations open the current Students, Review Queue, or Operations presets while mentor-meeting follow-up stays summary-only.
selectedReason: Current repo evidence showed that functions/api/program-teacher/dashboard.ts already emitted Needs Attention rows, workspace.js already rendered those rows through the shared action-capable attention component, and the existing Students, Review Queue, and Operations presets already supported missing mentor, submitted, missing evidence, behind-support, revision, and presentation follow-up. The safest slice was to wire only those exact rows into the backed presets and keep mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only because no precise current destination is proven for it.

not selected: lower current pain than unresolved Program Dashboard dead ends
deferred: hosted runtime is outside this local batch
deferred: backend queue rows are still absent
deferred: mutation and audit design still needed
deferred: browser runtime proof is outside this local batch

nextRecommended: Keep Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise scoped destination exists; if that remains blocked, inspect a role-safe global search landing that reuses current Student Directory search filters.
doNotRepeat: Do not remove the Program Teacher Needs Attention drill-downs while the existing Students, Review Queue, and Operations presets still back them.
Do not add a Program Teacher mentor-meeting drill-down until a precise scoped destination exists.
Do not broaden Program Teacher visibility beyond the current scoped Students, Review Queue, and Operations routes while deepening dashboard follow-up.
